headline: Goldman Trims Roblox’s Target to $125 but Keeps the Buy Rating: Is the Engagement Story Still Intact?

headline: Modern Wealth Expands Into Colorado With $1 Billion Acquisition
summary: Modern Wealth, a registered investment advisory firm with an aggressive acquisition strategy, announced Wednesday that it acquired Brown and Company, a wealth manager with $1 billion in assets based in Denver.  The deal, Modern Wealth’s 21st since its launch, pushes its assets under management to more than $13 billion.  The deal is Modern Wealth’s second this month and its first in Colorado.

content.title: Modern Wealth Expands Into Colorado With $1 Billion Acquisition
content.summary: Modern Wealth, a registered investment advisory firm with an aggressive acquisition strategy, announced Wednesday that it acquired Brown and Company, a wealth manager with $1 billion in assets based in Denver.  The deal, Modern Wealth’s 21st since its launch, pushes its assets under management to more than $13 billion.  The deal is Modern Wealth’s second this month and its first in Colorado.
